hero.subtitle: Whether you want to pass on your expertise and value your time, or experience a privileged moment of exchange with those who inspire you, Faymz makes access simple and authentic.

concept.card1_desc: An exclusive online meeting with your favorite personality for a personalized exchange, advice, or a privileged moment.
concept.card2_desc: Online collective sessions or face-to-face meetings to share a unique experience with a community.

promo.subtitle: Browse our catalog of talents, book your slots and live exceptional moments.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question or want to join the Faymz adventure?
contact.msg_success: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.msg_error_config: Missing configuration: Access key not found.
contact.msg_error_default: An error occurred while sending the message.
contact.msg_error_network: A network error occurred. Please try again later.

cats.entrepreneur_desc:
Founders, business angels, investors, experts, and strategic mentors.

Example of an original experience: "Pitch & Feedback" session or masterclass on fundraising with a renowned business angel or successful entrepreneur, to benefit from tailored advice and a critical look at your project.
cats.talents_desc:
Actors, comedians, artists, and other creative profiles from stage and screen.

Example of an original experience: A "private mini-show" with a comedian.
cats.sport_desc:
Professional athletes, top-level coaches, and iconic figures from the sports world.

Example of an original experience: Tactical training with a pro football player.
cats.musique_desc:
Singers, musicians, producers, and professionals from the music industry.

Example of an original experience: VIP studio session with an artist to discover behind-the-scenes recording, listen to exclusive demos, etc...
cats.influence_desc:
Content creators, digital influencers, and social media public figures.

Example of an original experience: Immersion workshop to uncover the secrets of content creation. For brands, Faymz can be an opportunity to present a product or initiate a strategic collaboration.
cats.autre_desc: Fully tailor-made experiences to bring exceptional moments to life.
